source.title: 视频｜404 . 8斤 ！ 宿迁试种出一巨型南瓜 ， 母体  重801斤

en.summary: A 404.8-jin giant pumpkin was grown in Suqian, China, with a mother plant weighing 801 jin.
en.why_irrelevant: It's a hyperlocal Chinese gardening feat far from typical user feeds.

zh.summary: 宿迁试种出一巨型南瓜重404.8斤，母体重801斤。
zh.why_irrelevant: 这是一个远离用户日常信息流的超本地化种植新闻。

brief: Tariffs, Middle East conflict, and India protests dominate headlines, with UN warning of escalating crisis and US imposing new tariffs on over 80 countries.
news_summary: Trump administration imposes tariffs on over 80 countries over forced labor; UN warns Middle East crisis is 'getting out of control'; India faces widespread protests after police brutality.
papers_summary: No new research papers reported today.

zh.brief: 曼德海峽與紅海航運危機風險上升，同時美國對多國加徵關稅引爭議；AI取代工作擔憂加劇。學術無重大更新。
zh.news_summary: 胡塞武裝威脅封鎖曼德海峽，全球航運風險升高；美國以強迫勞動為由對80多國加徵關稅，引發民主黨批評。

todays_image.caption: Like the fan-like lobes of Lobophora that can obscure underwater views, GLP-1 drugs now carry a warning of potential vision loss.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
